settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize the app and manage local data

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Remove your account and associated personal data
deleteAccount.warning: This action is permanent. Bookmarks, progress, posts and your profile will be deleted.
deleteAccount.hint: Enter your password and type ELIMINAR to confirm.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: You will not be able to recover your account or personal data.
deleteAccount.confirmRequired: Type ELIMINAR in uppercase to confirm.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: An error occurred while deleting the account.
deleteAccount.publicHint: If you are not signed in, you can request deletion from the web form.
deleteAccount.publicUrlUnavailable: The public link is not available right now.

goals.title: My goals
goals.subtitle: Configure and track your daily reading and study
goals.todayPending: Keep reading and studying to complete your goals
goals.weekChartHint: Gold bars = reading, green = study. The dot means both goals were met that day.
goals.trackingHint: Reading is tracked while you use the book reader. Study is tracked in the study center. Data is stored on this device.
